title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

authors.rationale: Credit and disambiguation of individual contributions.

year.rationale: Provides temporal context to the research.

abstract.rationale: Gives a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Permanent identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform where the research is disseminated.

keywords.description: List of keywords related to the paper
keywords.rationale: Facilitates searchability and categorization of the research.

system_overview.rationale: Describes the main functionalities and purpose of the system.

generation_mechanism.rationale: Explains the technical basis of narrative creation.

user_interface.rationale: Details how users interact with the system.

narrative_generation.rationale: Provides insights into the methodologies used for story creation.

story_structure.rationale: Defines how stories are organized and constructed.

propp_based_grammar.rationale: Indicates the theoretical framework guiding the narrative.

narrative_elements.description: Key elements in the narrative (characters, settings)
narrative_elements.rationale: Identifies the components that make up the stories.

multimedia_integration.description: Integration of various media in storytelling
multimedia_integration.rationale: Discusses how text, music, and visuals are combined.

music_generation.rationale: Explains how music complements the narrative.

visual_representation.rationale: Describes how images and animations enhance the story.

evaluation.rationale: Assesses how well the system meets its objectives.

user_feedback.rationale: Provides insights into user satisfaction and areas for improvement.

demonstration_results.rationale: Highlights the system's reception in real-world settings.

future_directions.rationale: Outlines plans for enhancing the system's capabilities.

mechanism_refinements.rationale: Aims to enhance narrative quality and coherence.

user_experience.rationale: Seeks to make the system more intuitive and engaging.
